description: Default capabilities for the main window. Filesystem and git access happen through purpose-built Tauri commands in src-tauri/src/commands/, NOT through tauri-plugin-fs — the architectural rule 'components never call invoke() directly' is enforced by typed wrappers in src/services/tauri-repository.ts. The dialog permission is for the system folder picker used in project open/create flows. The scoped http permission exists solely for the Zotero local API (localhost:23119) — Zotero sends no CORS headers, so the webview's own fetch cannot reach it; src/services/zotero.ts is the only caller.
